query: Top 5 outliers in crime reports this year render this to a Miro board

intent.thinking: The user wants to identify the top 5 outliers in Austin crime reports for this year and visualize the results on a Miro board. Outliers likely refer to crime types with unusually high or low counts compared to others.

steps.rationale: Group crime reports by type for this year to identify counts and detect outliers.

args.title: Top 5 Crime Type Outliers in Austin (This Year)
args.summary: This visualization highlights the top 5 outlier crime types in Austin for the year 2025-2026.

steps.rationale: Render the top 5 outlier crime types and their counts to a Miro board for visual collaboration.
Provide proper attribution for the crime report data used in the analysis.

answer: The top 5 crime type outliers in Austin this year are Family Disturbance (7,772 reports), Burglary of Vehicle (5,975 reports), Theft (5,524 reports), Criminal Mischief (4,220 reports), and Auto Theft (3,677 reports). A Miro board has been created to visualize these findings.
